activities.title: Inflation concepts warm-up
activities.purpose: Activate prior knowledge and agree a working definition of inflation.
activities.learner_task: Discuss in your group and complete the task cards.
activities.expected_output: A shared definition plus evidence from scenarios.

activities.title: Measuring Inflation: Indicator Comparison
activities.learner_task: Complete the comparison table and answer the discussion prompts.
activities.expected_output: Completed table rows plus short answers to two prompts.
activities.support_note: Offer a worked example for CPI if groups stall in the first five minutes.

activities.title: Household scenario — fixed income
activities.learner_task: Read all scenarios and complete the worksheet table.
activities.expected_output: Completed worksheet rows for each scenario.

activities.title: Household scenario — variable costs
activities.learner_task: Compare impacts across scenarios using the worksheet.
activities.expected_output: A short comparison statement supported by table evidence.

activities.title: Policy and communication wrap-up
activities.learner_task: Use the discussion prompts to debrief as a class.
activities.expected_output: Two contributions per group to the whole-class discussion.
